subject: Mathematics
title: Word Problem Warrior
tagline: Translate real-world problems into equations and solve them!

stages.name: Stage 1
stages.question: Naledi has R20 and spends R7 at the grocery store. How much money is left?
stages.wrongFeedback: Not quite — the answer is R13.

stages.name: Stage 2
stages.question: Aisha has R329 and spends R111 at the spaza shop. How much money is left?
stages.wrongFeedback: Not quite — the answer is R218.

stages.name: Stage 3
stages.question: Kagiso buys 3 pencils at the market stall, each costing R3. How much does Kagiso spend in total?
stages.wrongFeedback: Not quite — the answer is R9.

stages.name: Stage 4
stages.question: Nomvula shares 10 notebooks equally into 2 bags. How many notebooks go in each bag?

stages.name: Stage 5
stages.question: Lerato buys 2 pencils at the market stall, each costing R3. How much does Lerato spend in total?
stages.wrongFeedback: Not quite — the answer is R6.

stages.name: Stage 6
stages.question: Zanele shares 16 notebooks equally into 8 bags. How many notebooks go in each bag?

stages.name: Stage 7
stages.question: Thabo buys 12 oranges at the grocery store, each costing R3. How much does Thabo spend in total?
stages.wrongFeedback: Not quite — the answer is R36.

stages.name: Stage 8
stages.question: Bongani buys 12 notebooks at the market stall, each costing R7. How much does Bongani spend in total?
stages.wrongFeedback: Not quite — the answer is R84.

stages.name: Stage 9
stages.question: Amahle shares 24 notebooks equally into 8 bags. How many notebooks go in each bag?

stages.name: Stage 10
stages.question: Nomvula buys 9 sweets at the school tuck shop, each costing R3. How much does Nomvula spend in total?
stages.wrongFeedback: Not quite — the answer is R27.
